name: server_info
description: Report this server's version, the pinned Godot versions it targets (4.4, 4.5), and which correctness pillars (GDScript lint, API symbols, scene/resource analysis) are currently available. Takes no arguments.

name: api_symbol_lookup
description: Look up a Godot API symbol (class, method, property, or signal) by name across the pinned Godot versions. Supports 'Owner.member' queries. Returns full signature data, or closest-match suggestions on a miss.

version.description: Limit to one version; omit to search all available versions

kind.description: Restrict results to one symbol kind

name: api_class_summary
description: Full member listing for one Godot class in one version: inheritance chain, methods, properties, signals, enums, and constants.

name: api_diff
description: Diff a Godot class or symbol between two versions (default 4.4 -> 4.5): what was added, removed, or had its signature changed, with old and new signatures side by side.

name: lint_file
description: Lint a single GDScript (.gd) file against the default ruleset. Provide either inline source or a path on disk. Config is loaded from the file's directory if a godot-correctness.config.json is present. Returns a findings array.

path.description: Path to the .gd file (used for the reported location and config lookup)

source.description: Inline GDScript source; if omitted, the file at 'path' is read

name: lint_project
description: Lint every GDScript file under a project root, honoring include/exclude globs from godot-correctness.config.json. Returns aggregated findings and severity counts.

path.description: Path to the Godot project root

name: validate_scenes
description: Validate every .tscn under a project root: ext_resource paths resolve, ExtResource references are declared, and there are no duplicate resource ids.

path.description: Path to the Godot project root

name: validate_project_config
description: Validate project.godot: the main scene exists, autoload paths exist, and input actions are well-formed.

path.description: Path to the Godot project root

name: validate_registries
description: Deep-validate data-driven .tres registries in the configured registryDirs: each parses, its script resolves (recording class_name), and every resource-path property points at an existing file (the dangling-path check).

path.description: Path to the Godot project root

name: project_report
description: Aggregate all static checks (scenes, project config, registries, and GDScript lint) into one report with severity counts.

path.description: Path to the Godot project root
